name: 人文地理
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 地理与空间 / Place & Geography / Place & Geography
curriculum_points: Students will examine patterns of population distribution and density, formulating questions about the factors (e.g., resources, economic opportunity) that influence where people live.
Learners will compare different types of human settlements (rural, urban, suburban) and communicate how these communities are organized to meet human needs.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
